title: Triplochlamys multiflora

This family is commonly known as the coffee or madder family, consisting of over 13,000 species. The Rubiaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. The classification of Triplochlamys multiflora places it within the genus Triplochlamys, which is a small group of flowering plants.
